name: mtl advanced ltd
description: The company specializes in engineering services and fabrication using advanced materials, making it a key player in the manufacturing sector. Their expertise may be particularly relevant for applications that require precise cutting techniques, such as waterjet cutting.

name: Waterjet Corporation S.r.l.
description: Waterjet Corporation offers high-pressure hybrid and electric pumps that ensure energy savings of up to 45% and efficiency of over 95%.

name: Flow International
description: Flow has been a leader in waterjet cutting technology since 1974, providing over 15,000 systems worldwide. Their expertise highlights the transformative potential of waterjet cutting across various industries.

name: FlowCut Waterjet Cutting BV
description: FlowCut Waterjet Cutting BV specializes in high-quality waterjet cutting solutions, offering expertise in 2D and 3D cutting, as well as microjet and tubular cutting. With over twenty years of experience, the company is recognized for its precision and innovative cold cutting processes, making it a trusted partner for various industries.

name: Precision Waterjet Inc. DBA PWJet
description: Precision Waterjet & Laser LLC (PW Jet) specializes in high-quality and precise waterjet cutting services, offering both abrasive and pure waterjet options. Their expertise caters to various industries, ensuring they handle orders from prototypes to full production.

name: Advanced Waterjet Solutions
description: Advanced Waterjet Solutions offers precision waterjet cutting that enhances production speed and minimizes material waste. Their cutting-edge technology ensures accurate and efficient metal cutting, making it a reliable choice for customized manufacturing needs.

name: Aquajet Cutting Technology
description: The company, Aquajet Cutting Technology, specializes in abrasive waterjet cutting, offering a comprehensive range of services including full-service cutting, systems, spare parts, and repair services. With over 25 years of experience, they are recognized experts in the field, providing solutions for both existing waterjet owners and those looking to develop their own cutting capabilities.

name: United Performance Metals
description: United Performance Metals (UPM) provides specialized water jet cutting services as part of its FIRSTCUT+® Processing Services, highlighting its commitment to high-performance metal solutions for various industries.

name: Precision Waterjet
description: Precision Waterjet & Laser specializes in waterjet cutting and offers a full spectrum of cutting and fabrication services, operating 24/7 to meet customer demands. With advanced machinery and a skilled team, they ensure high-quality results across various industries.

name: Denver Waterjet LLC
description: Denver Waterjet specializes in waterjet cutting, providing precision cutting for various materials and thicknesses. Their expertise includes certified welding and turnkey solutions, making them a valuable resource for custom projects across multiple industries.
